'''''The Star Wars Sourcebook''''' is a [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|sourcebook]] written by [[Bill Slavicsek]] and [[Curtis Smith]]. It was first published in [[October]] [[1987]] by [[West End Games]], and was the first ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying-game]] sourcebook ever published. It was revised for the [[The Star Wars Sourcebook (Second Edition)|Second Edition]] by [[Bill Smith]] and [[Peter M. Schweighofer]], and republished in June [[1994]].

The book covers information of various sorts regarding the ''Star Wars'' universe, including chapters on general [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] systems, [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], space [[Transport/Legends|transports]], [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ground assault vehicles, [[Alien/Legends|aliens]], creatures, general equipment, [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]], [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] bases, Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]], and the heroes and villains of the [[original trilogy]] of movies.

As the first ''Star Wars'' roleplaying-game reference, this book contains some information that has been contradicted by later materials.

On [[July 5]], [[2018]], [[Fantasy Flight Games]] re-released ''The Star Wars Sourcebook'' alongside [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] as part of ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game 30th Anniversary Edition]]''.

==Opening crawl==
{{OpeningCrawl
|name=The Star Wars Sourcebook
|text=A great Rebellion burns across the vast
reaches of space. It is a Rebellion against
tyranny, against oppression, against the evil
monster which the Empire has become.

In the Rebellion, a pitifully-few valiant men,
women and aliens, known as the Alliance, wage
a desperate war against the overwhelming armies
and ships of the Emperor, ruler of a thousand-
thousand worlds. Outnumbered and outgunned, the
Rebels fight on, with only their great courage - and
the mystical power known as the Force - offering even
the slimmest chance of victory.

This is the galaxy of the Rebellion. It is a galaxy of
wondrous aliens, bizarre monsters, strange Droids,
powerful weapons, great heroes, and terrible villians. It is
a galaxy of fantastic worlds, magical devices, vast fleets,
awesome machinery, terrible conflict, and unending hope.
|audio=
}}
